codeReview.summary: Current HEAD closes the prior hybrid subset-loss replay hole. `DealerReceiptPostingService.recordDealerReceiptSplit(...)` now validates replay-scope allocation completeness before returning a replayed journal, and the new code-red regression proves that deleting one row from a four-row canonical hybrid allocation set now fails closed instead of succeeding.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The accounting hard-cut skill still phrases degraded replay proof too generically for multi-allocation hybrid corridors; this rerun needed an explicit worker reminder to prove both all-rows-missing and subset-rows-surviving replay failures.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/accounting-hardcut-worker/SKILL.md:91 requires only 'at least one degraded replay state where canonical allocation rows are missing or incomplete', while the worker handoff at /Users/anas/.factory/missions/b3885fb3-3080-480f-9f59-1eba48c5f565/handoffs/2026-04-23T04-43-27-388Z__dealer-payment-event-receipt-hardcut__24d6cb3a-352d-4696-84da-7bf865ea6dbc.json:95 asks for an explicit checklist item covering both all-rows-missing and subset-rows-surviving hybrid cases.

summary: Pass: the rerun fixes the prior dealer hybrid receipt replay failure. Current HEAD now rejects subset-loss degraded replay states by comparing replay-scope persisted allocations to the requested hybrid receipt amount, and the added regression covers the exact four-row partial-loss scenario that previously slipped through.
